title: OECD Model Tax Convention 2017 baseline reference for Articles 10 to 12

paragraphs.text: Reduced dividend branch for direct 25 per cent corporate holdings maintained throughout a 365-day period.

conditions: The beneficial owner is a company that holds directly at least 25 per cent of the capital of the paying company throughout a 365-day period that includes the payment date.

paragraphs.text: General dividend withholding cap for other cases.

conditions: Applies in all other dividend cases not covered by the reduced-rate branch.

paragraphs.text: General interest withholding cap when the beneficial owner is resident in the other state.

conditions: The beneficial owner of the interest is a resident of the other Contracting State.

paragraphs.text: Royalties are taxable only in the residence state of the beneficial owner.

conditions: Royalties arise in one state and are beneficially owned by a resident of the other Contracting State.

paragraphs.text: Definition paragraph for royalties; no source-state withholding cap is created here.

conditions: Payments are for the use of, or right to use, qualifying intellectual property or industrial, commercial, or scientific experience.
